data.title: Binance to launch multi-currency quarterly delivery contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the USDⓈ-M and COIN-M quarterly 0926 delivery contracts after 08:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. USDⓈ-M quarterly contracts include BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT, and COIN-M quarterly contracts include BTCUSD, ETHUSD, BNBUSD, ADAUSD, LINKUSD, BCHUSD, XRPUSD, DOTUSD, LTCUSD and SOLUSD. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with Notable Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, several cryptocurrencies have shown significant fluctuations in their daily performance. Leading the gains, WIF is currently priced at $0.528, marking an 8.63% increase. NOT follows with a price of $0.00257, up by 5.36%, while PEOPLE is valued at $0.0175, reflecting a 4.04% rise. INJ and AAVE also saw increases, with INJ at $10.088, up 3.64%, and AAVE at $180.38, rising by 3.60%.

Conversely, some cryptocurrencies experienced declines. RAY is priced at $1.741, showing a 2.69% decrease. ATOM follows with a price of $4.703, down by 1.63%. SUI is valued at $2.361, reflecting a 1.37% drop, while XTZ and ILV also saw decreases, with XTZ at $0.709, down 0.87%, and ILV at $14.37, declining by 0.76%.

data.title: Eclipse is suspected to have registered the subdomain "claim.eclipse.xyz" and may launch an airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Community users discovered that Eclipse has allegedly registered a subdomain of "claim.eclipse.xyz". The community speculated that this move may mean an upcoming airdrop.

data.title: Eric Trump joins Metaplanet strategic board of advisors
data.description:
Bitcoin-stacking firm Metaplanet has appointed US President Donald Trump’s son, Eric Trump, to its newly established Strategic Board of Advisors to further Metaplanet’s mission to become a “global leader in the Bitcoin economy.””His business acumen, love of the Bitcoin community and global hospitality perspective will be invaluable in accelerating Metaplanet’s vision of becoming one of the world’s leading Bitcoin Treasury Companies,” Metaplanet’s CEO Simon Gerovich said in a March 21 announcement on X.”As a globally recognized business leader and entrepreneur, Eric Trump brings a wealth of experience in real estate, finance, brand development, and strategic business growth and has become a leading voice and advocate of digital asset adoption worldwide,” Metaplanet added.

*Metaplanet Appoints Eric Trump to Strategic Board of Advisors* pic
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/eric-trump-joins-metaplanet-strategic-board-advisors?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announces fresh $850M DOGE cuts at the DOD
data.description:
The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is active in the Department of Defense (DOD), according to a disclosure by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth. The Trump appointee shared a video where he listed the agency’s discoveries and those that have been discontinued.  In the footage Hegseth posted on his official X page, he announced his decision […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/defense-secretary-hegseth-850m-doge-cuts/
